steps.title: Spot the narrator's central purpose
steps.content: The defining signal is the claim “there's just a chance that I shall make it” followed by detailed explanation of her physical strengths (quick, wiry, tough) and tactical advantage (dodging to grab the ball).

steps.title: Match the purpose
steps.content: The narrator explains why she thinks she might make the basketball team by describing her relevant strengths. Choice A compares basketball to other sports (not discussed), choice B explains how to play basketball (not her purpose), and choice C addresses team selection criteria (not mentioned). That matches choice D — D is correct.
